artifacts.name: Covenant Lock Remnant
artifacts.description: A sealed remnant of the false hair-sign recovered from Iron & Covenant Fitness. It still tightens when a command is phrased as an oath.

artifacts.name: Handwritten Authority Cards
artifacts.description: Local command cards issued during the Meridian dispatch incident. They prove a field order can hold without one central voice.

artifacts.name: Aldermoor Duty Log
artifacts.description: The Room 14 duty log, sealed by Ross. The ink discrepancy remains visible under ordinary light.

artifacts.name: Sealed Idol Fragment
artifacts.description: A non-conductive containment unit holding the original anomalous scrap from Offering Floor.

artifacts.name: Voided Faction Tokens
artifacts.description: Forged command tokens logged as void after Sub-Level 3. Their edges remain heat-warped.

artifacts.name: File 7-C Dispute Record
artifacts.description: A sealed dispute record proving Chamber Seven's evaluation system treated suffering as evidence.
